narrative:
Rice Township has 1,662 registered voters, with 52.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 32.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 14.5%, a pronounced Republican lean of 18.2 percentage points.
